data.description: A creature you touch drops to 0 hit points, but not dead. The creature is unconscious and appears dead. For the duration, the creature can't move or perform actions.

You can cause a familiar to reappear within 30 feet of you, even if it's on another plane of existence. If you already have a familiar and can't cast this spell again for at least one day, the familiar adopts a new form from the list of possible familiars. Finally, when you cast a spell with a range of touch, your familiar can deliver that spell as if you had cast it. The familiar must be within 100 feet of you and use its reaction to do so. If the spell requires an attack roll, it uses your spellcasting ability modifier.
